title: Sign In
business_purpose: Provide a clear entry screen while full auth/session implementation is pending approval.
primary_user_context: Any user trying to enter the portal.
user_goal: Understand current sign-in availability and next step.
success_outcome: User sees plain guidance about authentication status and rollout dependency.

visibility_rules.description: Visible to users before authentication is available.

record_scope_behavior.description: This screen does not expose tenant data until authenticated access exists.

data_sources.label: Access rollout status
data_sources.description: Provides a plain-language status that auth/session is deferred in Phase 1.

empty_data_behavior.title: No account actions
empty_data_behavior.message: There are no account actions available yet.

empty_state.title: Sign in is not ready yet
empty_state.message: Authentication is planned but not implemented in this phase.

loading_state.title: Loading
loading_state.message: Please wait while this screen loads.

error_state.title: Something went wrong
error_state.message: Please try again. If this continues, contact support.

permission_denied_state.title: Access denied
permission_denied_state.message: You do not have permission to open this screen.

forbidden_behaviors: No fake data may be shown in this screen.
No placeholder actions may be presented to users.
No hardcoded roles, units, or campuses are allowed.
No cross-organization data exposure is allowed.
No out-of-scope frontend or backend behavior may be implemented from this contract alone.
Do not simulate login, session creation, or token issuance.
